Infrastructure

Never Rely On
One Account

The #1 mistake high-risk advertisers make. A single ban kills everything. I architect multi-layered Business Manager ecosystems so you never go dark.

Account Architecture Building...
1

4-Profile Architecture

Each Facebook profile plays a specific role. Profile 1 runs ads. Profile 2 owns the Main BM. Profile 3 is silent backup. Profile 4 hosts pixels and pages - completely isolated.

2

Pixel and Page Isolation

Pixels live in a verified, separate BM shared into Main. Pages live in yet another BM. If your main account gets hit, you keep your data and don't start from zero.

3

Agency Account Fallback

An Agency Ad Account connected to Main BM provides an additional spend vehicle. If a personal ad account is shut down, the agency account keeps campaigns live within hours.

4

Result: Zero Downtime

This is the infrastructure standard in grey-hat affiliate marketing - now applied to your legitimate high-risk brand. One account dying is an inconvenience, not a catastrophe.

Compliance Tech

How Cloaking
Keeps Ads Live

Facebook's review bot sees one page. Your real audience sees another. Understanding this is the difference between running and banned.

Frequently Asked

Are you an agency? ↓
No. I'm not another agency. I'm a growth partner. I embed myself in your business, understand your offer deeply, and treat your ad account like my own. No account managers, no layers - direct access and full accountability for results.
What makes you different from a standard media buyer? ↓
I specialize exclusively in high-risk and restricted verticals. Deep compliance knowledge, proprietary account management infrastructure, and creative frameworks built for grey-area advertising.
My account keeps getting banned. Can you fix this? ↓
Account stability is a core part of what I do. Through multi-profile structures, compliant funnel architecture, and platform-aware creative, I minimize disruption. When issues arise, I know how to navigate recovery and rebuild safely.
Do you run ads for medical practices and telehealth? ↓
Yes. Exosome therapy, stem cell clinics, regenerative medicine, and telehealth are primary focus areas. I have specific creative and funnel frameworks that comply with platform policies while driving patient acquisition.
